component.name: Paste
component.summary: End-to-end encrypted notes and clipboard, synced peer-to-peer

description.p: Paste is a personal, end-to-end encrypted note and clipboard that syncs peer-to-peer across all your own devices over the Pear / Holepunch network. Copy on your laptop, paste on your phone — everything is encrypted on-device before it leaves. No account, no cloud, and no server holds your content.

This Flatpak bundles its own runtime (the Freedesktop platform), so it runs on older Linux distributions — such as Ubuntu 20.04 (glibc 2.31) — that the native .deb / AppImage cannot support, because the bundled Electron runtime requires a newer glibc than those hosts provide.
End-to-end encrypted notes + clipboard, synced peer-to-peer. Flatpak bundles its own runtime to run on older Linux.
